When a customer brings a car to the shop, the manager gets the customer’s name, address, and telephone number.  Then the manager determines the make, model, and year of the car, and gives the customer a service quote.  The service quote shows the estimated parts charges, estimated labor charges, sales tax, and total estimated charges.”", "runs": [{"text": "\t“Joe’s Automotive Shop services foreign cars, and specializes in servicing cars made by Mercedes, Porsche, and BMW.
